The Breakfast Club AI Search readiness  ·  2025
Diagnostic quiz

Where does your brand
stand on AI Search?

Nine questions. Four outcomes. Find out whether your organisation is reactive, adaptive, strategic or predictive — and what it means for your visibility.

Follow the path from Start here and choose the answer that honestly reflects where your brand is right now — not where you wish it was. Each answer leads to your next question. Keep going until you reach your result.

0 of 9 answered
Start here
When AI Search comes up in a meeting, what usually happens?
Question 1
Have you checked how AI crawlers interact with your site?
Question 2
Is AI Search considered when planning SEO, social or content marketing?
Question 3
How intentional is your approach to earning authority online?
Question 4

Question 7

Question 8

Question 9
How proactive is your organisation about future search trends?
Your result
Reactive
Not yet set up for AI Search.

AI platforms don’t yet have strong signals about your brand’s authority, relevance or expertise. The good news: early movers are still rare and there’s significant ground to gain.

Reactive

Adaptive
Beginning to experiment.

Your teams recognise the impact of AI Search and are starting to test new approaches. Building consistency across channels will accelerate your progress.

Strategic
AI Search is embedded in your planning.

SEO, content, social and authority-building work together to improve visibility in AI-driven search. The next step is moving from reactive optimisation to predictive positioning.

Predictive
You anticipate change before competitors do.

Your organisation is proactively adapting to how AI reshapes discovery. You’re tracking signals, coordinating teams and building authority ahead of the curve.
